persistentElement.name: work packet
persistentElement.role: viewer-tracked work item that evolves from task to loop packet, tool request, checked action, and final proof
states: loop packet in the agent cycle
tool request moving through coding tools
candidate action checked by the harness
proof packet landing in the final formula

transitions.surprise: The harness frame stays fixed while the rest of the scene is swept off-screen and the loop world slides in.
transitions.outgoingState: The harness enclosure is the one stable element at the end of the model-versus-harness scene.
transitions.bridgeAction: Hold a static anchor sweep: the teal harness frame remains locked in screen space while surrounding modules move away and the next scene enters.
transitions.incomingState: The radial loop appears behind the same fixed harness idea, so the viewer sees a change of environment rather than a thrown object.
transitions.compositionShift: Centered runtime enclosure is held as an anchor while radial process space replaces everything around it.
transitions.colorShift: Teal stays as the continuity color while the white background and scene contents reset.
transitions.cameraShift: Full-scene lateral sweep replaces the subtle packet camera move.
transitions.spaceShift: External harness chassis changes into internal process loop space by moving the whole scene, not by launching a packet.
validationChecks: static anchor sweep keeps the harness frame stable
surrounding scene content moves off-screen before the loop scene lands

transitions.surprise: The loop is interrupted by a blue action corridor that opens across the center, previews tool cards, and expands into the coding workflow without hiding the whole screen.
transitions.outgoingState: The trace stack and loop action state are visible as the source of the blue cover.
transitions.bridgeAction: Open a blue portal corridor over the loop, show a lightweight preview of repo, editor, terminal, and pruebas, then let the destination tool workflow take over under the same blue route.
transitions.incomingState: The tool corridor appears through the portal, with the action color inherited by the route.
transitions.compositionShift: Radial loop is interrupted by a horizontal corridor aperture that matches the destination flow spine.
transitions.colorShift: Blue stays as an action-route color instead of becoming an opaque screen.
transitions.cameraShift: Outgoing scene compresses slightly as the corridor opens; incoming scene appears through the same corridor.
transitions.spaceShift: Process loop space becomes repository/tool space by opening a destination window, not by blanking the frame.
validationChecks: center portal reveal does not hide the whole frame
ACCION label stays attached to the portal, not a blank title card
tool corridor preview appears before the destination scene settles
destination space returns with tool-route blue

transitions.surprise: The validated patch check grows so large that it becomes a new space, then a red POLITICA card interrupts before the camera pulls back into the policy boundary scene.
transitions.outgoingState: The patch and green check are the highest-confidence marks in the coding workflow.
transitions.bridgeAction: Zoom through the check until it fills the frame, then flash a red POLITICA card and let policy bars cut across the zoom as the scene reframes.
transitions.incomingState: The boundary/evidence scene appears from the zoom-out with the blocked action already framed by policy.
transitions.compositionShift: Horizontal tool flow becomes a split-screen boundary composition through an extreme scale change.
transitions.colorShift: Validation green swells first, then red policy overlays it.
transitions.cameraShift: Extreme zoom-in and zoom-out replace object travel.
transitions.spaceShift: Tool chain space becomes safety/evidence space by entering and exiting a magnified verdict mark.
validationChecks: extreme zoom reframe fills the frame with the validation mark
red POLITICA card and policy bars appear before the new scene settles

transitions.surprise: The proof state takes over the entire screen as a green card, then collapses back to white with ghost formula tiles before a different final composition.
transitions.outgoingState: Trace and evaluation cards make green proof the final state of the boundary scene.
transitions.bridgeAction: Use a full-screen color card: green fills the frame, VALIDADO appears, then a white reset previews formula tiles before opening into the final formula.
transitions.incomingState: The final formula appears after the color card, not as a continuation of a moving object.
transitions.compositionShift: Split-screen comparison is erased by a full-screen proof card and replaced by centered formula.
transitions.colorShift: Evaluation green becomes the entire screen, then resolves to a light final scene with green proof accents.
transitions.cameraShift: No travel path; the transition relies on full-frame color and reset timing.
transitions.spaceShift: Audit space is deliberately broken by the proof card before definition space appears.
validationChecks: full-screen color card briefly dominates the frame
VALIDADO message appears inside the green proof state
ghost formula tiles appear during the white reset
final definition remains readable after the white reset
